name: Taco Cabana Franchising, Inc.

current_snapshot.headquarters: 1077 Central Parkway South, Unit 600, San Antonio, Texas 78232

validation_questions: Confirm Item 19 cohort size and definition with franchisor.
Confirm current auditor and most recent audit opinion.

internal_unresolveds.reason: Revenue recognition discrepancy — FDD body states 5% royalty + 3% brand fund; FY2023 financial notes say up to 4% royalty and up to 1% advertising. Legacy NM franchise agreements may have different fe
Related-party cash drain — franchisor advanced $1.46M+ to related parties (FY2024 + post-year-end), exceeding operating cash flow. Independent financial capacity of franchisor entity is minimal.
Zero franchise growth — no new franchise units opened in 3 years despite active FDD. Growth ambition unclear.
Brand Fund never activated — 3% contractual obligation exists but no monies collected as of issuance date.
Ghost kitchen encroachment — franchisor reserves right to operate/license delivery kitchens in Protected Area using Taco Cabana Marks.
Nick the Greek cross-brand competition — same ownership can place Nick the Greek units inside franchisee's Protected Area.
Fee rates in financial statements vs. FDD body — FY2023 notes say royalty up to 4% and advertising up to 1%; FDD body says 5% and 3%. Likely reflects legacy vs. current franchise agreement terms.
